variants.title: HiFi Filter SAM 7147 Filtering Mass
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAM 7147 Filtering Mass. Easy to install and replace, the SAM 7147 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: FILTERING MASS, Dimension 1 (D1): 245.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 228.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 82.5 mm, Height 1 (H1): 130.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 117.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 85.0 mm
